chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-2628/2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 15.09.2021 Mr. Farmanullah advocate Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG............... At the outset learned AAG contends that appeal preferred by petitioner with competent authority will be decided preferably within fifteen days. Further he contends that petitioner has right to approach services tribunal. Instant petition is disposed of in terms of above statement and in case is appeal is not decided within that period or if he is aggrieved with that decision, petitioner will be competent to approach services tribunal provided under the law. J U D G E J U D G E IK
